ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the match is played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "fulltime_home_goals" INTEGER /* Full-time goals scored by the home team */,
  "fulltime_away_goals" INTEGER /* Full-time goals scored by the away team */,
  "fulltime_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (H, D, A) */,
  "halftime_home_goals" INTEGER /* Half-time goals scored by the home team */,
  "halftime_away_goals" INTEGER /* Half-time goals scored by the away team */,
  "halftime_result" TEXT /* Result at half-time (H, D, A) */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Finished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee FOREIGN KEY ("referee") REFERENCES referees ("referee_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "home_colors" TEXT /* Home colors of the team */,
  "away_colors" TEXT /* Away colors of the team */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stats entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match being analyzed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being analyzed */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the team is the home or away team */,
  "total_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the team */,
  "on_target_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots on target by the team */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total corners taken by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "ball_possession" REAL /* Ball possession by the team in percentage */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the team in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stats entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match being analyzed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being analyzed */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player being analyzed */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the team is the home or away team */,
  "total_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the player */,
  "on_target_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots on target by the player */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the player */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total corners taken by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the injured player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team of the injured player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the injured player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match for which odds are provided */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker offering the odds */,
  "home_win" REAL /* Odds for home team to win */,
  "draw" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_win" REAL /* Odds for away team to win */,
  "over_2_5_goals" REAL /* Odds for over 2.5 goals in the match */,
  "under_2_5_goals" REAL /* Odds for under 2.5 goals in the match */,
  "both_teams_to_score" REAL /* Odds for both teams to score in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, coach, bettor) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
